test-set.name: prod-ItemTypeDecl
test-set.description: Tests for item type declarations: 4.0 proposal

schema.description: A schema user defined types and constructor tests

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-001
test-case.description: local union type, used in instance of
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); 2 instance of local:int-or-string

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-002
test-case.description: local union type, used in instance of with occurrence indicator
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); (2, "fred") instance of local:int-or-string*

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-003
test-case.description: local union type, used in cast as. Issue 163
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); "fred" cast as local:int-or-string

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-004
test-case.description: local union type, used in cast as. Issue 163
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); "30" cast as local:int-or-string

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-005
test-case.description: local union type, used in treat as
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); "fred" treat as local:int-or-string

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-006
test-case.description: local union type, used in variable declaration

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-007
test-case.description: local union type, used in variable declaration, forwards reference (now allowed)

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-008
test-case.description: local union type, used as function argument

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-009
test-case.description: local union type, used as function result

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-010
test-case.description: local union type, used as function argument, forwards reference

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-011
test-case.description: local union type, used as type of local variable
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); let $x as local:int-or-string := 42 return $x + 1

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-012
test-case.description: local union type, used as type of local variable, type error
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); let $x as local:int-or-string := 8.3 return $x + 1

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-013
test-case.description: local union type, used in castable as. Issue 163
test-case.test: declare type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); "fred" castable as local:int-or-string

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-014
test-case.description: %public is ignored in main module
test-case.test: declare %public type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); "fred" castable as local:int-or-string

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-015
test-case.description: %private is ignored in main module
test-case.test: declare %public type local:int-or-string as (xs:integer | xs:string); "fred" castable as local:int-or-string

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-016
test-case.description: Forwards references are allowed

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-017
test-case.description: Self-references are not allowed

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-018
test-case.description: Mutual recursion is not allowed

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-019
test-case.description: Forwards references are allowed: multiple indirection

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-020
test-case.description: Map key type must be atomic

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-021
test-case.description: Map key type must be atomic

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-022
test-case.description: Map key type must be atomic

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-023
test-case.description: Forward reference in let clause

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-024
test-case.description: Forward reference in group by clause

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-025
test-case.description: Forward reference in cast expression

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-026
test-case.description: Forward reference in constructor function

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-027
test-case.description: Error, duplicate type names

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-028
test-case.description: Item type references a user-defined type in a schema.

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-029
test-case.description: Error, duplicate type names

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-030
test-case.description: Reference public item type in library module

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-031
test-case.description: Reference private item type in library module

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-032
test-case.description: item type in library module is both %public and %private

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-033
test-case.description: Name clash with public item type in library module

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-034
test-case.description: item type in library module is not in module namespace

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-035
test-case.description: Reference implicitly public item type in library module

test-case.name: itemTypeDecl-036
test-case.description: Reference public variable with a private item type in library module
test-case.test: import module namespace mod1="http://example.ns/module1"; year-from-dateTime($mod1:now) idiv 2000
